home_meta_desc: Free, fast, and secure image processing platform running 100% in your browser. Compress, resize, and convert images instantly.
home_desc: Lightning-fast image processing without uploading files to a server. Your privacy is our top priority.
home_tools_desc: Start processing your images with our simple professional tools.
home_tool_compress_desc: Reduce your image file size without losing significant quality.
home_tool_resize_desc: Change the width and height of your images easily and quickly.
home_tool_png_desc: Convert your transparent PNG files into high-quality JPG format.
home_tool_webp_desc: Convert your images to modern WebP format for better web optimization.
home_features_fast_desc: All processing is done directly in your browser. No upload waiting time.
home_features_secure_desc: Your images never leave your device. Privacy is fully guaranteed.
home_features_free_desc: Use all our features unlimited without any hidden costs or subscriptions.
home_about_p1: Imagera.id is a modern image processing platform designed for speed and security. We understand that uploading personal data to servers often raises privacy concerns. That's why we developed this technology to run 100% locally in your browser.
home_about_p2: Whether you need to compress photos for a website, resize images for social media, or convert file formats, Imagera.id offers a seamless experience without installing any additional apps. Everything is instantly accessible from any device.
footer_desc: A modern image processing platform running 100% in your browser. Fast, secure, and respectful of your privacy.
compress_title: Compress Image Online - Fast & Secure | Imagera.id
compress_meta: Reduce your JPG, PNG, or WEBP image file size without significant loss in quality. 100% secure and runs in your browser.
compress_desc: Reduce your image file size by instantly adjusting the compression quality.
compress_note: Lower quality results in a smaller file size but reduces image detail.
compress_seo_p1: Our image compression tool utilizes modern browser Canvas API technology to process your files locally. This means your images are never uploaded to any servers, guaranteeing 100% data privacy.
compress_seo_li1_desc: Your data stays on your device.
compress_err: Failed to compress image. Please try again.
resize_title: Resize Image Online - Fast & Secure | Imagera.id
resize_meta: Instantly resize your image width and height. Maintain aspect ratio easily. 100% secure and runs in your browser.
resize_desc: Change your image width and height resolution accurately according to your needs.
resize_note: Larger dimensions will increase file size and may decrease sharpness.
resize_seo_p1: Use our image dimension tool to change your photo resolution without downloading special software. Here are the advantages:
resize_seo_li1_desc: Specify exact width and height in pixels.
resize_seo_li2_desc: Maintain original image proportions to prevent distortion.
resize_seo_li3_desc: Resizing process is done via browser smoothing algorithm for best results.
resize_err: Failed to resize image. Please try again.
pngtojpg_title: PNG to JPG Online - Free & Secure Conversion | Imagera.id
pngtojpg_meta: Convert your PNG files to JPG with a white background instantly. 100% secure and runs in your browser. Unlimited free.
pngtojpg_desc: Change transparent PNG files into high-quality JPG with a white background.
pngtojpg_note1_start: Transparent background on your PNG files will automatically be covered with a
pngtojpg_note2: The JPG format does not support transparency, so transparent areas will become solid.
pngtojpg_seo_p1: PNG files often have much larger sizes due to resolution and transparency data (alpha channel). Converting to JPG is highly recommended for use on websites or blogs to speed up page loading.
pngtojpg_seo_li1_desc: JPG file size is more optimal for SEO.
pngtojpg_seo_li2_desc: JPG is supported by almost all news readers and email apps.
pngtojpg_seo_li3_desc: Conversion is done instantly on the client side.
pngtojpg_err: Failed to convert image. Please try again.
webp_title: Convert to WebP Online - Fast & Secure | Imagera.id
webp_meta: Convert your JPG or PNG images to WebP format for optimal web performance. 100% secure, offline processing in your browser.
webp_desc: Optimize your images for the web by converting them to the modern WebP format.
webp_note: Lower quality means smaller file sizes. WebP offers excellent compression while maintaining visual quality.
webp_seo_p1: WebP is a modern image format developed by Google that provides superior lossless and lossy compression for images on the web.
webp_seo_li1_desc: WebP files are typically 25-34% smaller than comparable JPEGs.
webp_seo_li2_desc: Faster loading times improve your website's search engine ranking.
webp_seo_li3_desc: Unlike JPEG, WebP supports both lossy compression and transparency.
webp_err: Failed to convert to WebP. Please try again.
jpgtopng_title: JPG to PNG Online - Free & Secure | Imagera.id
jpgtopng_meta: Convert your JPG images to lossless PNG format instantly. 100% secure and runs in your browser. Unlimited free.
jpgtopng_desc: Change your JPG files into high-quality PNG format with transparency support.
jpgtopng_note: Converting to PNG results in a larger file size but maintains image quality without degradation (lossless).
jpgtopng_seo_p1: PNG is the best format choice if you prioritize image quality over file size, or if you plan to perform further editing later.
jpgtopng_seo_li1_desc: No image detail is lost when re-saving.
jpgtopng_seo_li2_desc: Excellent for design assets that are frequently re-edited.
jpgtopng_seo_li3_desc: Although JPG doesn't have it, PNG is ready if you want to add transparency later.
jpgtopng_err: Failed to convert to PNG. Please try again.
crop_title: Crop Image Online - Precision & Ease | Imagera.id
crop_meta: Crop your images to various aspect ratios (1:1, 16:9, 4:3) or free-form instantly. 100% secure and runs in your browser.
crop_desc: Adjust your image composition by accurately cropping the desired area.
crop_note: Use drag and zoom to adjust the crop area within the preview box.
crop_seo_p1: Cropping helps remove unnecessary elements from a photo, focus the audience on the main subject, or adjust images for specific social media formats.
crop_seo_li1_desc: Easily adjust images for Instagram (1:1) or YouTube covers (16:9).
crop_seo_li2_desc: Apply the rule of thirds for more aesthetic photo results.
crop_seo_li3_desc: Reduce file size by discarding areas that are never used.
crop_err: Failed to crop image. Please try again.
watermark_title: Watermark Image Online - Text & Logo | Imagera.id
watermark_meta: Add text or logo watermark to your images instantly. Adjust position, size, and transparency easily. 100% secure in your browser.
watermark_desc: Protect your work by adding visual identities to your images.
watermark_note: All processing is done on your device. Original images and watermarks are never sent to our servers.
watermark_seo_p1: Watermarking is an effective way to protect copyright and build brand awareness. With Imagera.id, you can add identifiers without the need for complex editing applications.
watermark_seo_li1_desc: Prevent unauthorized use of images by others.
watermark_seo_li2_desc: Ensure the audience knows who the original content creator is when the image is shared.
watermark_seo_li3_desc: Provide the impression of assets curated by a professional company/photographer.
watermark_err: Failed to add watermark. Please try again.
